name: Documentation Landing
description: Marketing landing page for a documentation platform. Features a search hero, feature highlights, and calls to action driving visitors into the knowledge base.

page_briefs.home: Documentation platform landing page. A full-width hero section features a large search bar centered over a gradient background with a tagline like 'Find answers instantly.' Below, a features grid highlights key capabilities — AI-powered search, versioned docs, API reference, and community guides — each with an icon and short description. A bottom CTA section encourages visitors to explore the docs or create an account, with primary and secondary action buttons.

shells.top-nav-footer: Top navigation bar with footer for public-facing marketing pages
